receipt_date.text: วันที่ใบเสร็จ

root.sql: select sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no , sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no) as mem_name , sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no) as group_name , sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount , '( '||pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount)::double precision)||' )' as thai_recept_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY ') as receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock , '( '||pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock)::double precision)||' )' as thai_share_stock , si_security_user.user_name , (select sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code )as resign_cause_name from sc_com_m_receipt , si_security_user , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = 'พ65006855' order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no
